candidates.why: Generic revenue label but appears all nan in preview; more specific and total lines exist with values.
Component of revenue, but not full company revenue.
Major component of operating revenue (shipping segment).
Major component of operating revenue (product services segment).
Supplemental component of product services revenue; not main consolidated total.
Explicit consolidated total revenue line summing all revenue components; best top-line choice.
Represents costs, not revenues; not appropriate for REVT.
Represents net time charter equivalent income, not gross revenue; secondary if true revenue labels missing.
Finance income, not operating revenue; not primary REVT.
Other operating income, not main revenue.
Represents operating profit, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Represents comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the financial period
candidates.why: Represents comprehensive income, not revenue.
Liability; not revenue line in the income statement.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the explicit consolidated top-line, with the component revenue lines added as fallbacks for historical label changes.

candidates.row_label: Cost of cargo and delivery expenses - Product Services
candidates.why: Direct cost related to product services; part of COGS but more granular than the consolidated COGS line.
Direct shipping voyage costs; component of COGS.
Direct fuel costs; part of voyage-related COGS.
Explicit consolidated COGS line; best single COGS proxy.
Overhead SG&A, not direct COGS.
Could be direct operating cost but more like operating/overhead; less ideal than explicit COGS.
Net other operating items, not pure COGS.
Duplicate-style other operating line; not core COGS.
Operating costs of vessels; components of operating costs but COGS aggregate already present.
Maintenance costs; components rather than aggregate COGS.
Residual operating expenses; not primary COGS measure.
Catch-all expenses, not direct COGS definition.
Represents operating result, not costs of goods sold.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement COGS.

variables.notes: The line 'Cost of revenues/COGS' is the explicit consolidated cost of goods sold figure; component cost lines are not needed for the single COGS input.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A overhead category; primary SG&A component.
Net other operating items; a reasonable SG&A-related component excluding core COGS.
Alternative/duplicate other operating line; also SG&A-type overhead.
Operating overhead for vessels; treated as SG&A/operating overhead rather than COGS given separate voyage and cargo costs.
Balance sheet accrual, not an income statement expense component; exclude for SG&A.

variables.notes: Selected multiple operating overhead components (G&A, other operating items, vessel operating expenses) while avoiding totals and non-P&L rows, consistent with SG&A_COMPONENTS rules.
No research and development-related line items are present in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews, so XRD is set to 0.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of equity interest in joint venture
candidates.why: Fair value/remeasurement item, not interest expense.
Main consolidated interest expense line; good generic XINT candidate.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; component of total interest expense.
Non-lease interest expense; core borrowing cost and best primary XINT if present.
Attribution of profit, not interest expense.
Attribution of profit, not interest expense.
Attribution of profit, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; backup if main lease interest line missing.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
Accrued interest liability, not P&L expense; backup only if no P&L interest lines existed.
Label is too generic and in balance sheet section; unclear nature and unused given explicit P&L interest lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority is given to the non-lease interest expense, then the total interest expense, then lease-related interest lines as fallbacks, following the rule to treat XINT as a single reported item over time.

candidates.row_label: Fair value (loss)/gain from equity financial asset
candidates.why: P&L fair value movement, not an equity total.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of equity interest in joint venture
candidates.why: P&L remeasurement, not book equity.
'Attributable to equity holders' refers to profit, not the equity balance sheet total.

candidates.row_label: Equity investments at FVOCI - fair value loss
candidates.why: OCI component, not equity total.

candidates.row_label: Equity financial assets, at fair value
candidates.why: Asset line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity Financial Assets at Fair Value
candidates.why: Asset line, not equity.
Represents shareholders' equity attributable to owners (parent), separate from non-controlling interests and total shareholders equity.
Includes both parent equity and non-controlling interests; would double count with MIB.

variables.notes: 'Equity' on the balance sheet appears to represent equity attributable to owners of the parent, with non-controlling interests presented separately, so it is the appropriate BE measure.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; useful as an MIB indicator but balance sheet NCI is preferred for BE+MIB.
Alternative income statement label for non-controlling interests; same concept as above.
Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; similar to previous entries.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary MIB choice.
Alternative balance sheet label for non-controlling interests; secondary MIB choice.

variables.notes: Primary MIB mapping uses the balance sheet non-controlling interests lines, with income statement NCI labels included as fallbacks for historical consistency.
